data.reasoning: Both models incorrectly skipped PKGBUILD as 'binary', preventing critical build/install script analysis. No meaningful audit occurred.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD (critical build script) skipped by both models
No review of .install hooks or source files with network/FS access
false_negatives: Potential risks in PKGBUILD (e.g., unsafe downloads, privilege escalation) missed due to skipped file
learnings: Improve binary detection: PKGBUILD is always text - skip binary checks for known script types
Prioritize core files: PKGBUILD/.install must be reviewed even if initial parse fails
Add fallback: If PKGBUILD errors, retry as text file with hexdump inspection
Require explicit justification for skipping critical files
